programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Expiando culpas
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Traición en la mira
programme.desc: Alejandro escucha los planes de Mili y Hugo para irse de luna de miel e invita a Florencia a irse de viaje a la playa. Florencia ve a Alejandro besando a Mili. Constancio decide ayudar a Mateo para que se quede con la empresa de Domingo.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Un nuevo compromiso
programme.desc: David le dice a Fernanda que va a oficializar su relación con Graciela. Por otro lado, Marta espera que David le de la oportunidad de cuidar a sus hijos nuevamente.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Visita inesperada
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Hombres enamorados
programme.desc: Daniela le dice a Gaviota que está preocupada por Rodrigo, pues sabe que sufre por ella. Alonso y Rodrigo compiten para impresionar a Gaviota.

programme.title: Teresa: Nueva vida
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María se declara culpable del asesinato de la madre de Soraya para salvar a Nandito.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa y Aurora se encuentran con Rubén en la primera comunión del hermano de Esperanza. Teresa se pone celosa al ver a Aurora cerca de Mariano. La familia de Esperanza se entera de que Rubén es casado. Esperanza encuentra a Rubén con Genoveva.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Esperanza llega a casa de Teresa huyendo de Rubén y descubre que él y su esposa están cenando con Arturo. Mariano le lleva una serenata a Teresa y Juana impide que Arturo se entere. Esperanza descubre que está embarazada de Rubén.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Mariano que también lo ama y que reconsiderará volver con él. Teresa y Fernando se conocen durante su viaje a Cancún. Aurora le dice a Mariano que Teresa se fue de viaje con Arturo y no sola como le había hecho creer.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Adolfo y Ezequiel hacen explotar el coche del almirante Robledo. Amelia le cuenta a Fabiola la verdadera historia de Graciela.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Jose Luis corre a Rosario de la casa. Ezequiel le confiesa a Carlota que el padre Anselmo sigue vivo gracias a él. José Luis arresta a Fabiola por fraude. María se disfraza de Montserrat para meterse en la cama de José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Carlota ayuda a que Monserrat vea a Alejandro. Ezequiel le dice al padre Anselmo que Alejandro está vivo y que lo llevará con él. Fabiola le cuenta a Monserrat que Graciela es hija de una costurera y que su verdadero nombre es Gaudencia Jiménez.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Fuertes sospechas
programme.desc: Rosendo intenta matar a José Miguel. Leonor descubre que Rosendo es el verdadero asesino de su padre. José Miguel sospecha que Leonor es la responsable de que Rosendo comprara sus terrenos.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Verdad revelada
programme.desc: Paulina le cuenta a Donato que es una usurpadora y le pide que no la le traiga más problemas con los Bracho. Piedad hará lo que sea para evitar que Carlos Daniel se divorcie de Paola.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: La Gata: Fuerte amenaza
programme.desc: Rita echa a Esmeralda de su casa tras golpear a Inés. Esmeralda pasa la noche en la calle y le pide a Rita que la deje regresar. Además, el "italiano" amenaza a Pablo con una pistola y le dice que se aleje de la Gata.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Convencimiento
programme.desc: Cynthia enfurece al saber que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula. Macaria entristece al saber que Ulises está cada vez menos interesado en recuperar su matrimonio. Rosaura le ruega a Bruno que convenza a Rogelio que busque a Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Celos
programme.desc: Bruno le propone a Katia que se vean en un hotel. Alex comienza a sospechar de Meche. Fernando siente celos al ver a Victoria con Hernán.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Visita en la cárcel
programme.desc: Gael se preocupa al saber que su madre está desaparecida. Sabrina visita a Paolo en la cárcel y él le confiesa que Florencia no está embarazada.

programme.title: 40 y 20: Un maestro en apuros
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura como orgánica e inorgánica y Germán es el encargado de dicha misión. Alejandra descubre que un niño de la escuela molesta a Morris.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer discuten sobre la boda de sus abuelos. En el noticiero "DMS por la noche", los locutores discuten sobre las noticias que exponen. El máximo exponente de la cinematografía, don Oscar, muestra sus mejores películas.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Doña Chivis aumenta la renta del departamento, y la Nena empieza a vender tartas caseras para poder pagarla. El administrador descubre el agujero que conecta la casa de los López con la del vecino y avisa a la propietaria legítima.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le explica a Mia que Gastón lo obligó a hacer un trabajo con Romina. Lupita le dice a Santos que la que lo besó fue Lola. Roberta le encarga a Rocco que la grabe cuando se le declare a Diego. Teo le pide a Jose que lo acompañe a ver a su mamá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lupita recrimina a Santos por rechazar a Lola y decirle que era por ella. Teo no resiste ver a su mamá mal y sale corriendo. Lola le dice a Lupita que la detesta. Roberta exhibe un video para demostrar que Diego y ella no tienen relaciones sexuales.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel no acepta que Franco le pague la colegiatura para que deje de ser becado Teo le reclama a José por decirle a Gastón que tiene asma para que no lo aceptara en el equipo de fútbol Roberta se disculpa con Diego por lo del video.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta insulta a Iñaki por inventar que Diego hablaba mal de ella. Teo le da clases de equitación a Raquel León rechaza tajantemente la idea de Diego de dedicarse a la música. Martín Octavio quiere platicar con Roberta sobre su cuadro.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El profesor Reverte lleva a Roberta a conocer niños de la calle y así aprenda a valorar lo que tienen en la vida. Alma le reclama a Reverte por haberse llevado a Roberta sin permiso. Iñaki se vuelve el técnico de RBD.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina le asegura a Mia que Sol es una buena persona. León lleva a cabo sus planes para lograr que Diego abandone la banda. Alma descubre que Octavio tiene un hermano gemelo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego convoca a sus compañeras para que hagan pruebas y así encontrar a las suplentes de Roberta y Lupita, debido a que ellas decidieron dejar el grupo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico decide hacer la audición para ser la nueva vocalista de la banda. Lola le confiesa a Roberta el gran amor que siente por Santos. Mia logra que Sol no se quede en la banda.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Las dos hijas de Roberto nacen el mismo día y él no sabe que hacer para que Pepa se aleje. Pepa enfurece al enterarse que la hija legítima de Roberto nació el mismo día que la suya.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Pepa roba a la hija de Regina y la registra como si fuera suya. Regina crece bajo el nombre de Renata y con una familia diferente, alejada de su verdadera madre.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Gonzalo se emociona al enterarse que su hijo Matías volverá a la ciudad. Gonzalo ve a Rafael abrazando a Renata y le pregunta si tiene algo que ver con él, ella le dice que solo son amigos.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Fina le pide a Roberta alejarse de Rafael. Roberta le dice a Rafael que deben escapar juntos porque sus padres se oponen a su relación.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia le reclama a Juan de Dios por haberle ocultado que él embarazó a Mireya. Julia le confiesa a Juan de Dios que Rufino es el padre de Mireya. Josefina descubre que Dinorah era la amante de su marido.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Remedios le confiesa a Julia que Dinorah esperaba un hijo de Fausto antes de casarse. Julia enfrenta a Dinorah para reclamarle por haber sido la causante de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Rufino y Dinorah tienen un terrible accidente al intentar huir del pueblo. Pablo realiza una búsqueda para encontrar a Rufino y hacerlo pagar por todo el daño que le ha ocasionado a Julia.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una historia de infinitos líos familiares y una denuncia sobre la injusta situación femenina.

programme.title: El juicio de los hijos
programme.desc: Una viuda es acusada por su suegra delante de sus hijos de que uno de ellos es el producto de un amorío.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una historia de infinitos líos familiares y una denuncia sobre la injusta situación femenina.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Evette and Jason see Real Potential
programme.desc: After two-years of renting in the suburbs Evette and Jason are ready to commit. The issue: while the houses they've been viewing hare new, they're surprisingly not very well cared for. Sarah shows them the potential of three suburban homes, trying to mitigate the quirks they've seen time and again. Once Evette and Jason buy, Sarah wrangles sense and style into the one room in their new home that remains a puzzle!

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Luxurious Bedroom Was Inspired by the Lush Texas Landscape
programme.desc: Virginia Toledo and Jessica Geller, at Toledo Geller in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, designed the intimate main bedroom and connected bath in our home as a total celebration of that landscape.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Texas Kitchen Proves You Don't Need An Island
programme.desc: There's no better place to vent, celebrate, or simply catch up about the events of the day than near snacks. Stephanie Sabbe of Sabbe Interior Design in Nashville designs the kitchen, dirty kitchen, and utility room in our home.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Home Office Doubles As a Workout Room
programme.desc: In creating a productivity-inspiring home office for our home, Baltimore-based designer Laura Hodges of Laura Hodges Studio decided to make it double as a no-pressure workout room.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: How To Transform Your Patio Into an Outdoor Entertaining Space
programme.desc: Los Angeles designer Linda Hayslett of LH.Designs designed around the pool at our home—a necessity in scorching hot Texas. The outdoor area feaures a fireplace, some youthful (but adult-friendly) swings, and more.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: How To Design a Cozy Den Using Color and Texture
programme.desc: Mikel Welch, owner of his eponymous New York firm, created a cozy sitting room that has a “cave-like” energy featuring palate-cleansing neutrals, elegant curtains, and textural furniture and accessories, sourced from Arhaus.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: How an Interior Designer Makes This 700-Square-Foot Living Room Feel Cozy
programme.desc: Undeterred, Emilie Munroe of San Francisco firm Studio Munroe set about making the massive space and adjoining vestibule more warm and inviting. Grounding colors set the tone: a deep sea blue on the walls, with inky black for the brick fireplace.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Small Media Room Is Full Of Hidden Storage
programme.desc: Wife-and-husband duo Heather and Matt French, of Santa Fe's French & French Interiors, splashed the media room in our home with bold pattern, dramatic color, and tons of texture, then crowned the design with a curtained trundle bed for drifting off into dreamland.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: Watch This Spare Room Become a Swanky Home Bar
programme.desc: One too many doorways can turn a room into a de facto hallway that's passed through rather than used. But for this space that opens onto the media room and office in our home, Dallas-based designer Jean Liu of Jean Liu Design knew the perfect solution: an elevated sipping room with a fully operational wet bar.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E01
programme.desc: In this episode, we head straight into the heart of New Zealand! We begin back in time, in an era of proud warriors and ancient traditions with Tamaki Maori Village, the most award-winning cultural attraction in New Zealand. Then we step through Hell's Gate and experience the country's most unique geothermal occurrence. Eager to catch our breath, we lose it walking amongst the breathing majestic giants at Redwood Tree Walk. And finally, arrive in Hobbiton. Yes, that Hobbiton of lore!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E02
programme.desc: In this episode, we seek refuge in Waiheke, New Zealand. Stonyridge Vineyards, a farm that is less about cropping and all about farming flavor- proves to be a fine locality from which to begin this episodic excursion into paradise. Unsurprisingly, our appetite for ingesting the best of this region leads us to the nutrient-rich, Te Matuku Marine Reserve- where we learn the value of a keystone species of the ecosystem... OYSTERS! Bellyful and bound to take a dip, we meander to Waiheke Island Resor

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E03
programme.desc: In this episode, we admire history from up high while visiting the oldest surviving lighthouse on mainland Australia. Then, we enter into a passionate relationship between an unordinary couple that involves alpacas. Next, our own expectations are blown away by retreating at the 12 Apostles/Alkina Lodge! Following that, we find a soulmate to our fellow animals at Great Ocean Road Wildlife Park. And finally, take a seat at the comfortable whiskey bar at Timboon Distillery before walking on top of

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E04
programme.desc: In this episode, we arrive in Sydney by departing into the Ken Done realm of artistry. Set a spin, we then roam the regions of Coffs Harbour and Urunga! Partaking in a happiness revolution in the shape of a grocery store (The Happy Frog) to paddle-boarding with direct descendants of the world's first stand up paddlers down a historical stream- this episode highlights the aim of being open to diversity in epic forms!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E05
programme.desc: In this episode, we "hang" with some friends abseiling over Southbank Parklands! Then we gather our courage and ascend the Story Bridge. Next, we mount some horses and find ourselves prospecting for gemstones at Thunderbird Park. Finally, we pull over and unwind in koala territory up on Mount Tambourine.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E06
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover where Australia begins by embarking down the Mulgrave River on an exclusive day tour out to the Frankland Islands. Next, we explore a bit of cultural history by spearfishing alongside the Daintree Rainforest. Then we go full eco-touristic while visiting a revered sanctuary of wildlife, Hartley's Crocodile Adventure! Ultimately, we arrive at Fitzroy Island Retreat. Enough said!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E07
programme.desc: In this episode, we pursue the spirit of ambition while discovering Hawaii's immortal culture! From walking the hallowed grounds of Hilo Coffee Mill to witnessing the reinvention of traditions at Old Lahaina Luau- this episode represents the best of what is to be expected while traveling wide-eyed through paradise!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E08
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit The Island of Hawaii better known as “The Big Island.” Here, we explore the history and geography of the islands, learn how to Hula Dance, visit a tranquil secluded retreat, learn the art of lei-making, and have some sea and land adventures!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E09

programme.desc: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity and sets up shop in Las Vegas! But first, Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from an lucha libre school, and Carlos and Matt have to break up a Botox party when they go after a car owned by a upper class housewife. programme.title: All In

programme.title: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong, but when Carlos reveals Froy's true whereabouts tempers ..

programme.title: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupt a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: Doomsday Prep
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Sugardaddy Shakedown
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose. Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resorts to violence because they can't comprehend. Will Sonia finally reveal what's happening, or will carrying her brother's burden get the best of her?

programme.title: The New Boss
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother?? Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from of yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat.

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno

programme.title: Bullseye!
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Phi Alpha Fail
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations, they become the RO's ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral.

programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party. And with Sonia's hands tied, she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane. The team takes to the skies, but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team? Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control?

programme.title: Rihanna: Rebirth

programme.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
programme.desc: JIRO DREAMS OF SUSHI is the story of 85-year-old Jiro Ono, considered by many to be the world's greatest sushi chef. He is the proprietor of Sukiyabashi Jiro, a 10-seat, sushi-only restaurant inauspiciously located in a Tokyo subway station. Despite its humble appearances, it is the first restaurant of its kind to be awarded a prestigious three-star Michelin Guide rating. Directed by David Gelbb.

programme.title: Blackfish
programme.desc: Killer whales are beloved, majestic, friendly giants, yet infamous for their capacity to kill viciously. BLACKFISH unravels the complexities of this dichotomy, employing the story of the notorious performing whale Tilikum, who — unlike any orca in the wild — has taken the lives of several people while in captivity. BLACKFISH expands on the discussion of keeping such intelligent creatures in captivity. Directed by Gabriela Cowperthwaite.

programme.title: The Wolfpack
programme.desc: THE WOLFPACK is a coming of age story following the six Angulo brothers who have spent their entire lives locked away from society in an apartment on the Lower East Side of Manhattan. All they know of the outside world is gleaned from the films they watch obsessively and recreate meticulously, using elaborate homemade props and costumes. For years this has served as a productive way to stave off loneliness – but when one of the brothers escapes, everything changes. Directed by Crystal Moselle.

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Nicola is a natural winemaker living in a remote village near Crotone, where his atavistic pursuit of wine is under active siege from climate related wildfires and the prolonged dry seasons. For Nicola, and other winemakers like him, this environmental change has existential consequences it threatens his livelihood. “Wildfire” patiently observes Nicola in this affective state of anxiety—as the wildfire grows within him—as he's forced to alter the course of his harvest in real time. Directed by Andree Ljutica.

programme.title: After Skid Row

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick “accidently” poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene's teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set. Will the bullying finally get slayed? And after weeks of avoiding The Beast, Tessa Blanchard must put it all on the line to prove she is the industries best in an epic Main Event Match for The WOW World Championship Title. Will The Beast finally make her mark?!

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. But did Tessa read the fine print in her contract? Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs. The shocking Main Event will determine who secures a championship title match against The Biggest, The Baddest, The WOW World Champion….The Beast!

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight's Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit. The Beast puts her WOW World Championship on the line by announcing an open challenge to the entire WOW roster. And Stephy Slays seeks retribution against the aggressor of her tag team partner Keta Rush's brutal attack.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self proclaimed “Grits N Glam” duo Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold. The Beast gets more than she bargained for while defending her title against The Temptress. Tensions rise between The Fabulous Lana Star and her prodigy The Lioness. And the WOW World Championship Titles are on the line as a newly formed dynamic team takes their shot at the champs, Fire and Adrenaline.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast, but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez, creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target. The Disciplinarian and Samantha Smart aim to take away the sunshine from new WOW competitor, Cali Ray. The relationship between Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal is tested. And The Psycho Sisters, Razor and Fury accompanied by Mezmeriah continue down their unpredictable path of destruction towards the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.
